creator: iio7@tutanota.com
text:
After having upgraded to 5.1.3.8246 the problem persists on FreeBSD 14.0.

==> /var/log/messages <==
Nov 28 01:03:00 foo kernel: pid 70218 (Radarr), jid 0, uid 352: exited on signal 6 (no core dump - other error)
